Hyperliquid return shapes

Source: R/types.R
hyperliquid_shapes.Rd

Reusable roxyassert @type record shapes for the data.tables returned by the Hyperliquid client classes. @genassert emits a standalone assert_type_<Shape>() validator for each shape and @exportassert exports them (alongside this block's assert_args_*/assert_return_*), so callers and the backtester can validate any value against a Hyperliquid shape as a conformance oracle.

Shapes: PerpMeta, Candles, L2Level, Position, MarginSummary, Fill, OrderResult, FundingHistory, StakingSummary, TransferAck.

Developed by Dereck Mezquita.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
